parameters.query:
SELECT title, priority, due_date, category, completed
FROM tasks
WHERE channel_id = 8497733638
AND completed = FALSE
AND (due_date <= CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day' OR due_date IS NULL)
ORDER BY due_date ASC NULLS LAST, priority DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT r.message, r.remind_at, t.title as task_title
FROM reminders r
LEFT JOIN tasks t ON r.task_id = t.id
WHERE r.channel_id = 8497733638
AND r.sent = FALSE
AND r.remind_at::date = CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY r.remind_at ASC;
